title: 🛡️ Hide Armor - See Player Skins
description: Hides the armor model so they don't render on the player
body:
![Banner](https://www.nottobla.me/resource-packs/hidearmor/banner.png)

**Hide Armor** is a simple resource pack that makes all armor textures transparent, allowing you to fully see player skins while still keeping the armor equipped. This is perfect for **SMP servers**, roleplay, or any setting where you want to interact with players without bulky armor blocking the view! ### Features - **Transparent armor** – Only removes the armor visuals, not the functionality. - **Better skin visibility** – Ideal for social or roleplay servers. - **Lightweight & compatible** – Works seamlessly with different resource packs. ### Preview ![Hide Armor Preview](https://nottobla.me/resource-packs/hidearmor/preview.jpeg) ### Mod Compatibility Want this pack to support a specific mod? Let me know on **[GitHub](https://github.com/NotToBlame/hide-armor)**! ### Just want to hide helmets? Check out [**👤 So No Head?**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/so-no-head) — it only removes the **helmet model**, so you can still show off the rest of your armor! [![So No Head?](https://nottobla.me/resource-packs/assets/snhpanel.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/so-no-head) ### Looking for more customization? Check out [**Show Me Your Skin! by enjarai**](https://modrinth.com/mod/show-me-your-skin) for advanced personalization options. This mod allows you to customize individual armor pieces and player appearances, with full server-side support. [![Show me your skin!](https://nottobla.me/resource-packs/assets/smyspanel.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/show-me-your-skin)
License 🛡️ Hide Armor is © NotToBlame.
